audit_log.requirement: Must scrape headlines from a public IT news site (or IT section of a news portal) for Алматы.
Must validate that the page content exists.
audit_log.comment: There is no validation to check if the page content exists before scraping.
The code does not include error handling to manage connection issues.
The 'requests.get' method does not implement a timeout.

audit_log.requirement: Must not crash if HTML structure changes.
audit_log.comment: The code does not handle situations where the HTML structure may change.
The function lacks a docstring explaining its purpose.

audit_log.requirement: Must log errors instead of printing.
audit_log.comment: The code does not have any logging implemented for errors.

audit_log.requirement: Must return at least 5 headlines if available.
audit_log.comment: There is no check to ensure at least 5 headlines are returned.
